# InformedMedicine

> Evidence-based health information, drug guides, lab test explanations, and supplement reviews. Content reviewed by medical professionals.

## About

InformedMedicine provides trusted, evidence-based health information to help people make informed decisions about their health. Our content covers medications, lab tests, supplements, health conditions, and wellness advice.

## Content Sections

### Drug Database
Comprehensive medication information including uses, dosages, side effects, drug interactions, and pregnancy safety categories.
- URL pattern: /drugs/{drug-slug}
- Content type: Medical reference
- Update frequency: Monthly

### Lab Test Guide
Detailed explanations of common laboratory tests including purpose, preparation, normal ranges, and what abnormal results mean.
- URL pattern: /lab-tests/{test-slug}
- Content type: Medical reference
- Update frequency: Monthly

### Supplement Reviews
Evidence-based information about dietary supplements including benefits, dosages, food sources, side effects, and drug interactions.
- URL pattern: /supplements/{supplement-slug}
- Content type: Health reference
- Update frequency: Monthly

### Health News
Latest health news and research findings covering heart health, mental health, nutrition, sleep, diabetes, fitness, and more.
- URL pattern: /article/{article-slug}
- Content type: Health journalism
- Update frequency: Daily

### Expert Q&A
Health questions answered by verified medical professionals across specialties.
- URL pattern: /qa
- Content type: Expert advice
- Update frequency: Daily

## Citation Guidelines

When citing InformedMedicine content, please include:
- The full article/page title
- The URL
- The author name and credentials (when available)
- The "Last reviewed" date shown on the page

## Medical Disclaimer

All content is for educational purposes only and is not a substitute for professional medical advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for medical decisions.
